sentence_reviews.text: A multimodal foundation model aligns and jointly processes text, images, audio, video, or actions through shared token spaces and cross-modal interaction.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The packet cites Deep Learning and Attention Is All You Need; these support neural and transformer background but do not directly cover modern multimodal foundation models across all listed modalities.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition is plausible but overbroad for the cited sources; a CLIP, Flamingo, Gemini, or multimodal foundation-model source would be more direct.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Multimodal foundation models is to connect Transformers, Cross-attention & co-attention to downstream capabilities including Multimodal assistants & vision-language systems, Browser, desktop & computer-use agents, Robotics & embodied AI.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Attention Is All You Need supports Transformer architecture; the downstream capability list is not directly supported by the cited references.
sentence_reviews.notes: Graph-derived downstream breadth should be narrowed or supported with specific multimodal assistant, computer-use, and robotics sources.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Multimodal assistants & vision-language systems
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources support neural/Transformer background, not this exact application substrate relation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Plausible, but not directly verified by the packet references.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Browser, desktop & computer-use agents
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources do not address browser, desktop, or computer-use agents.
sentence_reviews.notes: No adequate cited support for this exact downstream claim.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources do not directly establish multimodal foundation models as robotics or embodied-AI substrates.
sentence_reviews.notes: Plausible in recent VLA work, but this packet lacks a direct robotics/VLA citation.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Transformers, Cross-attention & co-attention.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports general limitations around optimization and inductive bias; Attention Is All You Need supports Transformer components.
sentence_reviews.notes: Generic limitation and dependency wording is defensible, but not directly stated as a multimodal foundation-model limitation.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal foundation models extends or specializes the architecture family Transformers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Attention Is All You Need defines Transformer architectures; modern multimodal foundation models commonly specialize Transformer backbones, but the packet lacks a direct multimodal source.
sentence_reviews.notes: The relationship is defensible as taxonomy synthesis, not exact direct support.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal foundation models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Cross-attention & co-attention.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Attention Is All You Need includes encoder-decoder attention but does not directly establish cross-attention as core across multimodal foundation models.
sentence_reviews.notes: Common in many multimodal models, but not universal and not directly supported by the cited sources.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal foundation models is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Contrastive and mutual-information objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports representation learning background, but the packet lacks a direct contrastive multimodal source such as CLIP.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is true for important multimodal models but not directly supported by the cited source set.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal foundation models consumes, emits, or organizes information using Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited source supports general neural data modeling, not this exact multimodal data dependency.
sentence_reviews.notes: Defensible from the node definition and taxonomy, but not directly source-verified.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal foundation models extends or specializes the architecture family VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The packet does not cite a VQ-VAE or learned tokenizer source for this dependency.
sentence_reviews.notes: Discrete tokenizers are used in some multimodal systems but are not universal, and the relationship type wording is too strong.

edge_reviews.notes: Transformer specialization is a defensible taxonomy relation, though not directly proven by a multimodal source.
Cross-attention is common but not universal; core strength is not established by the cited source set.
Contrastive objectives are important but not adequately supported here without a direct multimodal contrastive-learning source.
The represents_with relation is defensible from the node definition, though source support is indirect.
Learned discrete tokenizers are used in some multimodal systems, but common strength and specializes/composes wording are not established.
